text:
Once upon an afternoon...

There was a curious little mouse who loved adventures. Spot was intrigued by the rustling trees and tiny bird songs. One sunny oatmeal morning, Spot decided he wanted an adventure further than could be.Oo oo!

So Spot hopped excitedly up the bark. Near a cozy oak tree he heard a choir-like singing. Glancing down he saw a flock of starlings fluttering gently as though chanting a secret tune.

With interest sparkled in his eyes, Spot joined their cheerful voices.

"Oh whistle-snickets! What secret dooredoo you sing?"

One startled owl's whistle sounded.

Spot thought that was intriguing... perhaps an owl might know secrets. He continued his cheerful humbling.

They fluttered down to him.

"Oh sweet tiny creature! Our secret is... starshine!

Each feather shimmered an ethereal glimmer.

Spot giggled.

"But didno owl Owl."

"No-o-o," they chorused. "...Owl Ow-Ow-Oo
